title: Tahlboorean language
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tahlboorean''' was the root [[Language/Legends|language]] of several dialects of the [[Tahlboorean]] [[Species/Legends|species]], spoken by both [[Troob]]s and [[Hobor]]s. While many Troobs learned to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], the Hobors stuck with Tahlboorean.

The [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] translated [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Nimondro]]'s Tahlboorean circa [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]''
